changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create daily continuous aggregate for admin event stats from hourly timeline
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS admin_event_stats_daily WITH (timescaledb.continuous) AS SELECT time_bucket('1 day', bucket) AS day, SUM(event_count) AS total_events, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_severity = 'CRITICAL') AS critical_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_severity = 'WARNING') AS warning_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_severity = 'OK') AS ok_count FROM event_timeline_hourly GROUP BY day;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add refresh policy for admin_event_stats_daily aggregate (every 5 minutes)
changeSet.sql: SELECT add_continuous_aggregate_policy('admin_event_stats_daily', start_offset => INTERVAL '7 days', end_offset => INTERVAL '5 minutes', schedule_interval => INTERVAL '5 minutes', if_not_exists => TRUE);
